runTitle: Production QA - v8.11.143 AI Assistant 3-Feature Check

aiLatencyObservations.source: Playwright resource timing + Cloud Run logs

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after production AI Assistant QA: effective=7.3966 USD, billed=0.0000 USD, chargeCount=6699.

artifacts.label: AI Assistant 3-feature summary and root cause

expertAssessments.rationale: AI Chat and Anomaly/Trend passed, but Reporter production surface failed despite HTTP 200 due fallback payload.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Deploy Reporter structured-output schema fix and rerun the 3-feature AI Assistant QA.

expertAssessments.rationale: AI Chat and Anomaly/Trend outputs matched current dashboard signals: 18 servers, 17 normal, 1 warning, cache-redis-dc1-01 memory 84%.
Reporter failure came from strict structured-output schema incompatibility, not user input or prompt leakage.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Keep strict schema regression coverage for nested structured-output fields.

expertAssessments.rationale: Cloud Run logs identified the upstream 400 while Vercel response was HTTP 200 fallback, so deploy and post-deploy QA closure are required.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Release a patch version and verify Cloud Run Reporter generation on production.

expertAssessments.rationale: Playwright MCP covered the three requested AI Assistant functions with durable screenshots and resource timing.

completedImprovements.title: Reporter structured output schema local fix prepared
completedImprovements.evidence: Commit a4d10314c; AI Engine type-check and full test passed locally

pendingImprovements.title: Deploy Reporter structured output schema fix
pendingImprovements.note: Production v8.11.143 still serves the failing Reporter schema until a new Cloud Run revision is deployed.

notes: AI Chat PASS: answer included whole-fleet status and cache-redis-dc1-01 memory 84% with no scaffold leakage.
Reporter FAIL: Vercel /api/ai/incident-report returned HTTP 200 fallback payload with source=fallback and X-Fallback-Reason=upstream_error; UI displayed 보고서 생성 실패.
Cloud Run logs showed invalid JSON schema for response_format incident_report nested required fields.
Anomaly/Trend PASS: whole-system analysis rendered 18 servers, 1 warning, cache-redis-dc1-01 memory 84%, and no scaffold leakage.

Architecture note: incident-report and monitoring-analysis artifact generators already exist, but the function tabs still call their APIs directly; artifact unification should be tracked as a separate SDD plan, not this QA run's wont-fix debt.
